branch_strategy: Single branch, commit at phase boundaries for rollback. Phase 1 commit after waves 1-2. Phase 2 commit after waves 3-4. Phase 3 commit after waves 5-6.

gate-yaml-schema.notes: Create 7 gate YAML files with pre_step/post_step structure. Pre_step dimensions: research=path-relevance, spec=testability, plan=complexity-assessment, decompose=wave-triviality. Use existing evals/dimensions/ as pattern reference.

ideation-gate-migration.notes: Migrate evals/ideation-gate.md to YAML. Preserve 4 dimensions in post_step section. Delete .md after.

evaluator-prompt-template.notes: Define subagent isolation contract. Specify inputs, prohibited context, response format, invocation pattern.

gate-orchestration-and-gradient.notes: Create run-gate.sh (writes YAML prompt file for subagent) and select-gate.sh. Update evaluate-gate.sh, record-gate.sh, update-state.sh for new decided_by vocabulary (manual|evaluated|prechecked). Update both schema files.

script-rewire.notes: Rename run-eval.sh -> check-artifacts.sh (Phase A only, writes results JSON). Rename auto-advance.sh -> gate-precheck.sh (tighten checks). Delete scripts/auto-advance.sh. Update validate-summary.sh decided_by check. Run grep sweep before and after. Smoke test end-to-end gate flow.

skill-docs-alignment.notes: Update all 8 step skills. Add Shell-checked/Evaluator-judged subsections for research, plan, spec, decompose. Replace auto-advance language. Update decided_by vocabulary in work-context.md.

protocol-docs-update.notes: Add gates section to eval-protocol.md. Rewrite gate-protocol.md for new architecture.

consumer-updates.notes: Update all remaining references. Run final grep sweep to verify no old names remain. Add merge migration note.
